---
title: "03_feature_engineering"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
dir.create(here("data", "processed"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Intermediate data
#--------------------------------------------------

merged_clinical_expression <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_expression_with_outcome.rds"))
merged_clinical_methylation <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_methylation_with_outcome.rds"))
merged_clinical_multiomic <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "merged_clinical_multiomic_with_outcome.rds"))
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Helper functions
#--------------------------------------------------

prop_missing_vec <- function(x) {
  mean(is.na(x))
}

variance_vec <- function(x) {
  var(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Keep only patients with known outcome
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_model <- merged_clinical_expression %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_500))

meth_model <- merged_clinical_methylation %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_500))

multi_model <- merged_clinical_multiomic %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_500))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Define metadata columns
#--------------------------------------------------

meta_cols <- c(
  "case_submitter_id",
  "case_uuid",
  "project_id",
  "age_at_index",
  "gender",
  "race",
  "ethnicity",
  "days_to_death",
  "days_to_follow_up",
  "survival_500"
)

# expression and methylation may also carry sample IDs
meta_cols_expr <- intersect(c("sample_submitter_id", meta_cols), names(expr_model))
meta_cols_meth <- intersect(c("sample_submitter_id", meta_cols), names(meth_model))
meta_cols_multi <- intersect(c("sample_submitter_id_expr", "sample_submitter_id_meth", meta_cols), names(multi_model))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Split metadata and feature columns
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_feature_cols <- setdiff(names(expr_model), meta_cols_expr)
meth_feature_cols <- setdiff(names(meth_model), meta_cols_meth)
multi_feature_cols <- setdiff(names(multi_model), meta_cols_multi)

# identify expression and methylation features in multiomic set
multi_expr_features <- multi_feature_cols[str_detect(multi_feature_cols, "^ENSG")]
multi_meth_features <- multi_feature_cols[str_detect(multi_feature_cols, "^cg")]
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Expression feature filtering
#    - keep complete genes
#    - remove zero-variance genes
#    - keep top 2000 variable genes
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_missing <- expr_model %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(expr_feature_cols), prop_missing_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "prop_missing"
  )

expr_keep_missing <- expr_missing %>%
  filter(prop_missing == 0) %>%
  pull(feature)

expr_var <- expr_model %>%
  select(all_of(expr_keep_missing)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), variance_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "variance"
  )

expr_keep_var <- expr_var %>%
  filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)

n_expr_keep <- min(2000, nrow(expr_keep_var))

top_expr_features <- expr_keep_var %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = n_expr_keep) %>%
  pull(feature)

x_expression <- expr_model %>%
  select(all_of(top_expr_features)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ log1p(.x)))

y_expression <- expr_model$survival_500

model_data_expression_only <- bind_cols(
  expr_model %>% select(all_of(meta_cols_expr)),
  x_expression
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 7. Methylation feature filtering
#    - keep probes with <=10% missingness
#    - remove zero/undefined variance probes
#    - median-impute remaining missing values
#    - keep top 2000 variable probes
#--------------------------------------------------

meth_missing <- meth_model %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(meth_feature_cols), prop_missing_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "prop_missing"
  )

meth_keep_missing <- meth_missing %>%
  filter(prop_missing <= 0.10) %>%
  pull(feature)

meth_var <- meth_model %>%
  select(all_of(meth_keep_missing)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), variance_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "variance"
  )

meth_keep_var <- meth_var %>%
  filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)

n_meth_keep <- min(2000, nrow(meth_keep_var))

top_meth_features <- meth_keep_var %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = n_meth_keep) %>%
  pull(feature)

x_methylation <- meth_model %>%
  select(all_of(top_meth_features)) %>%
  mutate(across(
    everything(),
    ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x)
  ))

y_methylation <- meth_model$survival_500

model_data_methylation_only <- bind_cols(
  meth_model %>% select(all_of(meta_cols_meth)),
  x_methylation
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Multiomic feature filtering
#    - expression branch: complete + nonzero variance
#    - methylation branch: <=10% missing + nonzero variance + impute
#    - keep top 1000 expression + top 1000 methylation
#--------------------------------------------------

multi_expr_missing <- multi_model %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(multi_expr_features), prop_missing_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "prop_missing"
  )

multi_expr_keep_missing <- multi_expr_missing %>%
  filter(prop_missing == 0) %>%
  pull(feature)

multi_expr_var <- multi_model %>%
  select(all_of(multi_expr_keep_missing)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), variance_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "variance"
  )

multi_expr_keep_var <- multi_expr_var %>%
  filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)

n_multi_expr_keep <- min(1000, nrow(multi_expr_keep_var))

top_multi_expr_features <- multi_expr_keep_var %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = n_multi_expr_keep) %>%
  pull(feature)

multi_meth_missing <- multi_model %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(multi_meth_features), prop_missing_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "prop_missing"
  )

multi_meth_keep_missing <- multi_meth_missing %>%
  filter(prop_missing <= 0.10) %>%
  pull(feature)

multi_meth_var <- multi_model %>%
  select(all_of(multi_meth_keep_missing)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), variance_vec)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = "feature",
    values_to = "variance"
  )

multi_meth_keep_var <- multi_meth_var %>%
  filter(is.finite(variance), !is.na(variance), variance > 0)

n_multi_meth_keep <- min(1000, nrow(multi_meth_keep_var))

top_multi_meth_features <- multi_meth_keep_var %>%
  arrange(desc(variance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = n_multi_meth_keep) %>%
  pull(feature)

x_multi_expr <- multi_model %>%
  select(all_of(top_multi_expr_features)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ log1p(.x)))

x_multi_meth <- multi_model %>%
  select(all_of(top_multi_meth_features)) %>%
  mutate(across(
    everything(),
    ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x)
  ))

x_multiomic <- bind_cols(x_multi_expr, x_multi_meth)

y_multiomic <- multi_model$survival_500

model_data_multiomic <- bind_cols(
  multi_model %>% select(all_of(meta_cols_multi)),
  x_multiomic
)
```

```{r}
any(duplicated(names(x_expression)))
any(duplicated(names(x_methylation)))
any(duplicated(names(x_multiomic)))
```


```{r}
write_csv(
  tibble(feature = top_expr_features),
  here("outputs", "tables", "selected_expression_features.csv")
)

write_csv(
  tibble(feature = top_meth_features),
  here("outputs", "tables", "selected_methylation_features.csv")
)

write_csv(
  tibble(feature = top_multi_expr_features),
  here("outputs", "tables", "selected_multiomic_expression_features.csv")
)

write_csv(
  tibble(feature = top_multi_meth_features),
  here("outputs", "tables", "selected_multiomic_methylation_features.csv")
)
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Save processed data
#--------------------------------------------------

write_rds(
  model_data_expression_only,
  here("data", "processed", "model_data_expression_only.rds")
)

write_rds(
  model_data_methylation_only,
  here("data", "processed", "model_data_methylation_only.rds")
)

write_rds(
  model_data_multiomic,
  here("data", "processed", "model_data_multiomic.rds")
)

write_rds(
  x_expression,
  here("data", "processed", "x_expression.rds")
)

write_rds(
  x_methylation,
  here("data", "processed", "x_methylation.rds")
)

write_rds(
  x_multiomic,
  here("data", "processed", "x_multiomic.rds")
)


write_rds(
  y_expression,
  here("data", "processed", "y_expression.rds")
)

write_rds(
  y_methylation,
  here("data", "processed", "y_methylation.rds")
)

write_rds(
  y_multiomic,
  here("data", "processed", "y_multiomic.rds")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. Save compact feature-engineering summary
#--------------------------------------------------

feature_engineering_summary <- tibble(
  dataset = c("Expression", "Methylation", "Multiomic"),
  n_patients = c(nrow(x_expression), nrow(x_methylation), nrow(x_multiomic)),
  raw_features_considered = c(
    length(expr_feature_cols),
    length(meth_feature_cols),
    length(multi_feature_cols)
  ),
  n_features = c(ncol(x_expression), ncol(x_methylation), ncol(x_multiomic))
)

feature_engineering_summary

write_csv(
  feature_engineering_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "feature_engineering_summary.csv")
)
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 11. Final checks
#--------------------------------------------------

dim(model_data_expression_only)
dim(model_data_methylation_only)
dim(model_data_multiomic)

dim(x_expression)
dim(x_methylation)
dim(x_multiomic)

table(y_expression)
table(y_methylation)
table(y_multiomic)

anyNA(x_expression)
anyNA(x_methylation)
anyNA(x_multiomic)
```
